text:
Market today: Sentiment is cautiously risk-on. The real driver is Micron's blowout earnings lifting the entire chip/AI hardware complex — SK Hynix surging 12% tells you the semis trade is alive. That's your world.

Your holdings: Three need attention. PLTR is down 12.77% and flagged SELL — on margin, that hole gets expensive fast, don't wait for 85. AVGO is your largest position, down 12.45% and flagged TRIM — the chip rally today is a gift to lighten up, not a reason to hold full size. SPAL is down 14.48% already with a tight stop at 19 and it's a 2x leveraged ETF that decays daily — margin plus leverage plus decay is a dangerous combo, size matters here. SPCX is brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no price history — manage it manually and keep size small.

Watch: How SMH trades today — it's your one clear winner (+11.32%) and a live read on whether this chip bounce has legs. Also watch if AVGO catches a bid on the semis enthusiasm.

Bottom line: Use today's chip strength to execute the trims and cuts you've been sitting on — margin means you can't afford to hope.
